revision.text: == List of subst helper templates == * {{tl|require substitution}} – Prints an error unless substituted. * {{tl|substituted or transcluded}} – if-then-else metatemplate that checks if a template is currently being substituted or transcluded ** {{tl|always substitute}} – For the [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|doc]] of the above templates; prints a message asking for it be substituted. ** {{tl|never substitute}} – The reverse of {{tlf|always substitute}}. For the doc of templates which should ''not'' be substituted; prints a message asking for it not to be substituted. ** {{tl|may be substituted}} – For the doc of templates whose substitution is optional. ** {{tl|substitution}} – Allows free-fill description of whether the template should be substituted and under what conditions. * {{tl|ifsubst}} – Forks if substituted or not. * {{tl|issubst}} – Returns "yes" if substituted. * {{tl|HTML comment}} – To sign substitutions with comments that contain wikitext expansions * [[Module:Unsubst]] – Prevents substitution. * [[Module:Unsubst-infobox]] – Prevents substitution for infoboxes, cleans up parameters.<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Template namespace templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Template namespace templates
revision.text:
== List of subst helper templates == * {{tl|require substitution}} – Prints an error unless substituted. * {{tl|substituted or transcluded}} – if-then-else metatemplate that checks if a template is currently being substituted or transcluded ** {{tl|always substitute}} – For the [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|doc]] of the above templates; prints a message asking for it be substituted. ** {{tl|never substitute}} – The reverse of {{tlf|always substitute}}. For the doc of templates which should ''not'' be substituted; prints a message asking for it not to be substituted. ** {{tl|may be substituted}} – For the doc of templates whose substitution is optional. ** {{tl|substitution}} – Allows free-fill description of whether the template should be substituted and under what conditions. * {{tl|ifsubst}} – Forks if substituted or not. * {{tl|issubst}} – Returns "yes" if substituted. * {{tl|HTML comment}} – To sign substitutions with comments that contain wikitext expansions * [[Module:Unsubst]] – Prevents substitution. * [[Module:Unsubst-infobox]] – Prevents substitution for infoboxes, cleans up parameters.<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation see also templates]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
== List of subst helper templates == * {{tl|require substitution}} – Prints an error unless substituted. * {{tl|substituted or transcluded}} – if-then-else metatemplate that checks if a template is currently being substituted or transcluded ** {{tl|always substitute}} – For the [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|doc]] of the above templates; prints a message asking for it be substituted. ** {{tl|never substitute}} – The reverse of {{tlf|always substitute}}. For the doc of templates which should ''not'' be substituted; prints a message asking for it not to be substituted. ** {{tl|may be substituted}} – For the doc of templates whose substitution is optional. ** {{tl|substitution}} – Allows free-fill description of whether the template should be substituted and under what conditions. * {{tl|ifsubst}} – Forks if substituted or not. * {{tl|issubst}} – Returns "yes" if substituted. * {{tl|HTML comment}} – To sign substitutions with comments that contain wikitext expansions * [[Module:Unsubst]] – Prevents substitution. * [[Module:Unsubst-infobox]] – Prevents substitution for infoboxes, cleans up parameters.<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation see also templates]]
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
== List of subst helper templates == * {{tl|require substitution}} – Prints an error unless substituted. * {{tl|substituted or transcluded}} – if-then-else metatemplate that checks if a template is currently being substituted or transcluded ** {{tl|always substitute}} – For the [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|doc]] of the above templates; prints a message asking for it be substituted. ** {{tl|never substitute}} – The reverse of {{tlf|always substitute}}. For the doc of templates which should ''not'' be substituted; prints a message asking for it not to be substituted. ** {{tl|may be substituted}} – For the doc of templates whose substitution is optional. ** {{tl|substitution}} – Allows free-fill description of whether the template should be substituted and under what conditions. * {{tl|ifsubst}} – Forks if substituted or not. * {{tl|issubst}} – Returns "yes" if substituted. * {{tl|HTML comment}} – To sign substitutions with comments that contain wikitext expansions * [[Module:Unsubst]] – Prevents substitution. * [[Module:Unsubst-infobox]] – Prevents substitution for infoboxes, cleans up parameters.<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation see also templates]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
== List of subst helper templates == * {{tl|require substitution}} – Prints an error unless substituted. * {{tl|substituted or transcluded}} – if-then-else metatemplate that checks if a template is currently being substituted or transcluded ** {{tl|always substitute}} – For the [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|doc]] of the above templates; prints a message asking for it be substituted. ** {{tl|never substitute}} – The reverse of {{tlf|always substitute}}. For the doc of templates which should ''not'' be substituted; prints a message asking for it not to be substituted. ** {{tl|may be substituted}} – For the doc of templates whose substitution is optional. ** {{tl|substitution}} – Allows free-fill description of whether the template should be substituted and under what conditions. * {{tl|ifsubst}} – Forks if substituted or not. * {{tl|issubst}} – Returns "yes" if substituted. * {{tl|HTML comment}} – To sign substitutions with comments that contain wikitext expansions * [[Module:Unsubst]] – Prevents substitution. * [[Module:Unsubst-infobox]] – Prevents substitution for infoboxes, cleans up parameters.<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation see also templates]]
</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

== List of subst helper templates == * {{tl|require substitution}} – Prints an error unless substituted. * {{tl|ifsubst}} – if-then-else metatemplate that checks if a template is currently being substituted or transcluded ** {{tl|always substitute}} – For the [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|doc]] of the above templates; prints a message asking for it be substituted. ** {{tl|never substitute}} – The reverse of {{tlf|always substitute}}. For the doc of templates which should ''not'' be substituted; prints a message asking for it not to be substituted. ** {{tl|may be substituted}} – For the doc of templates whose substitution is optional. ** {{tl|substitution}} – Allows free-fill description of whether the template should be substituted and under what conditions. * {{tl|issubst}} – Returns "yes" if substituted. * {{tl|HTML comment}} – To sign substitutions with comments that contain wikitext expansions * [[Module:Unsubst]] – Prevents substitution. * [[Module:Unsubst-infobox]] – Prevents substitution for infoboxes, cleans up parameters.<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Template namespace templates]] </noinclude>

== List of subst helper templates == * {{tl|require substitution}} – Prints an error unless substituted. * {{tl|ifsubst}} – if-then-else metatemplate that checks if a template is currently being substituted or transcluded ** {{tl|always substitute}} – For the [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|doc]] of the above templates; prints a message asking for it be substituted. ** {{tl|never substitute}} – The reverse of {{tlf|always substitute}}. For the doc of templates which should ''not'' be substituted; prints a message asking for it not to be substituted. ** {{tl|may be substituted}} – For the doc of templates whose substitution is optional. ** {{tl|substitution}} – Allows free-fill description of whether the template should be substituted and under what conditions. * {{tl|issubst}} – Returns "yes" if substituted. * {{tl|HTML comment}} – To sign substitutions with comments that contain wikitext expansions * [[Module:Unsubst]] – Prevents substitution. * [[Module:Unsubst-infobox]] – Prevents substitution for infoboxes, cleans up parameters.<noinclude> [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Template namespace templates]] </noinclude>
